name: Sprint 9.5: Exit Classifier Post-Deployment Validation
objective: Deploy exit classifier in monitored mode, collect real classification evidence, build validation dataset, and establish production monitoring before using classifier outputs as training labels
scope: Enable exit classifier in monitored production mode
Log every exit classification with full evidence
Set up alerts for anomalies and misclassifications
success_criteria: All exit classifications logged with transaction signature, exit_type, confidence, evidence
Alerts configured for UNKNOWN_EXIT >20%, distribution shifts, LP misclassification
Labelled dataset: 50 DEX sells, 50 transfers, 20 LP actions, 20 CEX deposits, 20 unknown
risks: Real-world classification accuracy unknown until measured
Unknown exit rate may be higher than expected
CEX deposit addresses may not be comprehensive
LP program IDs may be incomplete
notes: Implementation complete. Monitoring infrastructure ready. Validation dataset builder ready. All imports verified.
